visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a young woman wearing a navy blue beret and a maroon off-shoulder puffed-sleeve top. She is standing in a Costco warehouse aisle, holding a very long, vertical cardboard box that resembles a train ticket. The background is filled with stacks of red boxed products and a large "COSTCO WHOLESALE" logo is superimposed at the top. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a large retail store. (2) A second young woman wearing a light pink sleeveless top enters the frame from the right. Both women are now holding these long boxes, which are cream-colored with black text and illustrations of a steam train. They smile and gesture towards the boxes. The setting remains the warehouse aisle with metal shelving and shoppers in the distant background. (3) The scene cuts to a closer shot of the two women. They are holding several of the long boxes, presenting them to the camera. The boxes have "HOGWARTS EXPRESS SNACK" printed on them. The women's facial expressions are animated and cheerful. A graphic with the words "Harry Potter" in its signature font appears in the center, surrounded by flame effects. (4) The camera shows a close-up of the product display on the shelf, revealing multiple boxes stacked together. Then it cuts back to the women, who are laughing and comparing the height of the boxes to themselves. One woman holds the box against her body to demonstrate its length. (5) The women continue to talk and point at the text on the boxes. The editing includes quick cuts between their presentation and closer looks at the product. They make direct eye contact with the lens, using hand gestures to emphasize their points. The warehouse environment remains consistent throughout the sequence.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 要去霍格華茲的同學們注意了. (2) [Subtitle]: 沒有車票是不能上車的. [Variety]: 哈利波特車票. [Variety]: 超巨大巧克力餅乾. (3) [Subtitle]: 哇 送人自用有夠驚喜 因為它好大. (4) [Subtitle]: 快要跟人一樣高. (5) [Subtitle]: 你看我180公分 它超長的耶. (6) [Subtitle]: 649元 裡面有各12入的巧克力. (7) [Subtitle]: 首先是 牛奶巧克力香草風味餅乾. (8) [Subtitle]: 跟牛奶餡可可餅乾. (9) [Subtitle]: 各位哈利波特迷可以告訴我們. (10) [Subtitle]: 請問你們要在幾號月台上海車呢?. (11) [Subtitle]: 想要看我們開箱的話 記得留言告訴我們. (12) [Subtitle]: 好 如果你們留言很多的話 我們就買回家開箱. (13) [Subtitle]: 那我覺得很棒的是 巧克力下面是有那個餅乾脆脆的. (14) [Subtitle]: 可是好不好吃呢? 靠你們的留言決定 我們要不要買來開箱.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators presenting a product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a navy blue beret and a maroon off-shoulder top. The second woman wears a light pink top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial shelving, and bulk-packaged goods on pallets.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice begins a lively narration with a clear and crisp delivery. A background music track consisting of a medium-tempo electronic pop beat with a bright synth melody begins simultaneously. There is a very subtle ambient room tone of a large indoor space. (2) At 0:04, a sharp "whoosh" sound effect accompanies a change in vocal intensity as a second female voice with a slightly higher pitch joins in briefly with laughter and a supportive remark. The primary narrator maintains a fast speech rate with high vocal arousal and positive valence. (3) A percussive "pop" sound effect triggers at 0:17 as the narrator transitions into discussing details like price and flavor variants. The music continues with a steady four-on-the-floor beat. The vocal pitch remains dynamic with frequent rising intonations to maintain viewer engagement. (4) Another "ding" or interface-style sound effect is heard at 0:28 as the narrator poses a question to the listeners. The background music remains constant in volume and tempo. The articulation is very clear and professional, suggesting a post-produced recording. (5) The final phase features a "swish" sound effect as the narration concludes with a call to action. The voices overlap slightly as they both speak enthusiastically. The BGM maintains its energy until a quick fade-out at the very end of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Feature Description -> Q&A Hook -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a specific Harry Potter-themed chocolate biscuit product available at Costco. It uses energetic presentation and humor to engage viewers and encourages them to comment to trigger a future unboxing video.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators are showcasing a specific product found at Costco, mentioning its price and calling for engagement to do an unboxing.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly energetic shopping recommendation video with standard social media editing features like variety-style captions and sound effects.
